channel.title: OWASP_2025_A05 on ZAP
channel.description: Recent content in OWASP_2025_A05 on ZAP

item.title: data: URL assigned to script.src
item.description: Tainted data: URL assigned to script.src and treated as executable content. Generated by OWASP PTK IAST Module

item.title: DOM XSS via document.write
item.description: Tainted data passed to document.write. Generated by OWASP PTK IAST Module

item.title: DOM XSS via DOM mutations
item.description: Tainted data inserted into the DOM via DOM mutation APIs. Generated by OWASP PTK IAST Module

item.title: DOM XSS via Element.innerHTML
item.description: Tainted data assigned to innerHTML (possible DOM XSS). Generated by OWASP PTK IAST Module

item.title: DOM XSS via Element.outerHTML
item.description: Tainted data assigned to outerHTML (possible DOM XSS). Generated by OWASP PTK IAST Module

item.title: DOM XSS via inline event handler
item.description: Tainted data flowed into an inline event handler. Generated by OWASP PTK IAST Module

item.title: DOM XSS via insertAdjacentHTML
item.description: Tainted HTML passed into insertAdjacentHTML. Generated by OWASP PTK IAST Module

item.title: Dynamic code execution via eval
item.description: Tainted string executed via eval(). Generated by OWASP PTK IAST Module

item.title: Dynamic code execution via Function constructor
item.description: Tainted string executed via Function constructor. Generated by OWASP PTK IAST Module

item.title: Dynamic code execution via Function.apply
item.description: Tainted string executed via Function.apply. Generated by OWASP PTK IAST Module

item.title: javascript: URL assigned to form action
item.description: Tainted javascript: URL assigned to form action. Generated by OWASP PTK IAST Module

item.title: javascript: URL assigned to formAction
item.description: Tainted javascript: URL assigned to formAction. Generated by OWASP PTK IAST Module

item.title: javascript: URL assigned to href
item.description: Tainted javascript: URL assigned to href and likely to execute in the current browsing context. Generated by OWASP PTK IAST Module

item.title: javascript: URL assigned to iframe.src
item.description: Tainted javascript: URL assigned to iframe.src. Generated by OWASP PTK IAST Module

item.title: javascript: URL navigated via location.href
item.description: Tainted javascript: URL assigned to location.href. Generated by OWASP PTK IAST Module

item.title: Prototype pollution influenced fetch() init
item.description: A prior tainted prototype write influenced inherited fetch() init fields. Generated by OWASP PTK IAST Module

item.title: Response field rendered via document.write
item.description: Response-derived data reached document.write. Generated by OWASP PTK IAST Module

item.title: Response field rendered via innerHTML
item.description: Response-derived data reached innerHTML. Generated by OWASP PTK IAST Module
